prophecies.q: 《神经漫游者》描述了全球互联的虚拟网络空间
prophecies.a: 「赛博空间。每天都有数十亿合法操作者经历的共识幻觉……从人类系统的每一台电脑中抽取的数据图形化呈现——难以想象的复杂性。」
prophecies.q_en: Neuromancer described a globally connected virtual network space
prophecies.a_en: "Cyberspace. A consensual hallucination experienced daily by billions of legitimate operators... A graphic representation of data abstracted from the banks of every computer in the human system — unthinkable complexity."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 吉布森在1984年描述的「赛博空间」精准预见了万维网（1991年发明）和现代互联网。全球数十亿用户每天在这个虚拟空间中交互，数据以图形界面呈现——与小说描述高度吻合。
prophecies.verdict_en: Gibson's 1984 description of 'cyberspace' accurately foresaw the World Wide Web (invented 1991) and the modern internet. Billions of users interact daily in this virtual space with data presented through graphical interfaces — closely matching the novel's vision.

prophecies.q: 《神经漫游者》描述了入侵企业数据库的职业黑客
prophecies.a: 「凯斯曾是最棒的牛仔之一，他的专长是入侵——在赛博空间的矩阵中穿越企业的冰墙防火墙，窃取有价值的数据。」
prophecies.q_en: Neuromancer described professional hackers who infiltrate corporate databases
prophecies.a_en: "Case had been the sharpest data-thief in the matrix, his talent was for penetrating the bright walls of corporate systems, opening windows into rich fields of data."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 职业黑客和网络犯罪已成为现实。从1990年代凯文·米特尼克入侵企业系统，到2020年代国家级黑客组织对企业和政府的大规模数据窃取（如SolarWinds事件），黑客入侵企业数据库已是全球性安全威胁。
prophecies.verdict_en: Professional hackers and cybercrime are now reality. From Kevin Mitnick's 1990s corporate infiltrations to 2020s state-sponsored hacking groups conducting massive data theft (e.g., SolarWinds attack), hacking into corporate databases is a global security threat.

prophecies.q: 《神经漫游者》描述了跨国企业取代政府成为权力中心
prophecies.a: 「巨型跨国企业拥有自己的法律、军队和情报机构，国家政府沦为它们的附庸。泰西尔-阿什普尔家族的权力超越任何国界。」
prophecies.q_en: Neuromancer described multinational corporations replacing governments as power centers
prophecies.a_en: "Megacorporations with their own laws, armies, and intelligence services, national governments reduced to their vassals. The Tessier-Ashpool clan's power transcended all borders."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 科技巨头（Google、Apple、Meta、Amazon等）的市值和影响力已超越许多国家的GDP。它们在数据隐私、言论审核、金融服务等领域拥有准立法权。但企业尚未完全取代政府职能，各国反垄断监管仍在运作。
prophecies.verdict_en: Tech giants (Google, Apple, Meta, Amazon) have market caps and influence exceeding many nations' GDP. They hold quasi-legislative power over data privacy, content moderation, and financial services. However, corporations haven't fully replaced government functions; antitrust regulation still operates.

prophecies.q: 《雪崩》描述了名为「元宇宙」的三维虚拟世界
prophecies.a: 「元宇宙是一条百米宽的大街，在光纤网络上铺展到整个世界。在这里人们以虚拟化身的形式社交、做生意、娱乐。」
prophecies.q_en: Snow Crash described a 3D virtual world called the 'Metaverse'
prophecies.a_en: "The Metaverse is a hundred-meter-wide boulevard, stretching across the entire fiber-optic network. Here people socialize, do business, and entertain in the form of avatars."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 斯蒂芬森1992年创造的「元宇宙」（Metaverse）一词直接成为2021-2022年科技行业最热门概念。Facebook更名为Meta，投入数百亿美元开发VR社交平台。虚拟化身、3D虚拟世界、VR社交等核心概念均已实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: Stephenson's 1992 coinage of 'Metaverse' became the tech industry's hottest concept in 2021-2022. Facebook rebranded to Meta, investing tens of billions in VR social platforms. Avatars, 3D virtual worlds, and VR social interaction are all realized.

prophecies.q: 《雪崩》描述了通过信息武器控制人类思维
prophecies.a: 「雪崩病毒既是毒品也是宗教也是电脑病毒。它通过位图图像传播，直接攻击黑客的脑干——语言是一种病毒。」
prophecies.q_en: Snow Crash described information weapons that control human minds
prophecies.a_en: "Snow Crash is a drug, a religion, and a computer virus all at once. It spreads through bitmap images, attacking hackers' brainstems directly — language is a virus."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 虽然直接攻击脑干的信息武器尚不存在，但信息操控已成现实：社交媒体算法操纵用户情绪和行为，深度伪造（deepfake）技术被用于虚假信息传播，剑桥分析公司事件证明了数据可被武器化以影响选举。
prophecies.verdict_en: While brainstem-targeting info weapons don't exist, information manipulation is real: social media algorithms manipulate emotions and behavior, deepfake technology spreads disinformation, and the Cambridge Analytica scandal proved data can be weaponized to influence elections.

prophecies.q: 《雪崩》描述了企业化的私人治理取代公共服务
prophecies.a: 「美国政府已经破产。披萨送餐、高速公路、监狱——一切都由私人企业经营。Mr. Lee的大香港特许经营体代替了传统的社区。」
prophecies.q_en: Snow Crash described privatized corporate governance replacing public services
prophecies.a_en: "The US government has gone bankrupt. Pizza delivery, highways, prisons — everything is run by private corporations. Mr. Lee's Greater Hong Kong franchise replaces traditional communities."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 私有化趋势显著但未达小说极端程度。美国私人监狱关押约8%的囚犯，私人军事公司（如黑水）承担部分军事任务，SpaceX接管NASA发射任务，亚马逊甚至建造了自己的城镇（HQ2）。但政府尚未破产。
prophecies.verdict_en: Privatization trends are significant but haven't reached the novel's extreme. US private prisons hold ~8% of inmates, private military companies (e.g., Blackwater) handle military tasks, SpaceX took over NASA launches, and Amazon even built its own town (HQ2). But the government hasn't collapsed.

prophecies.q: 《神经漫游者》描述了虚拟现实头戴设备和全感官沉浸
prophecies.a: 「他戴上仿真刺激器，电极贴片贴住太阳穴。赛博空间在他眼前展开——一片无限延展的网格，数据塔耸立如城市天际线。」
prophecies.q_en: Neuromancer described VR headsets and full sensory immersion
prophecies.a_en: "He put on the simstim unit, electrode trodes against his temples. Cyberspace unfolded before his eyes — an infinite grid stretching out, data towers rising like a city skyline."
prophecies.verdict_zh: VR头戴设备已从概念变为消费级产品：Oculus Quest系列、Apple Vision Pro、PlayStation VR等均已上市。虽然全感官沉浸尚未实现，但视觉和听觉的沉浸式体验已相当成熟。Meta Quest 3于2023年售出超千万台。
prophecies.verdict_en: VR headsets evolved from concept to consumer products: Oculus Quest series, Apple Vision Pro, PlayStation VR are all commercially available. While full sensory immersion isn't achieved, visual and auditory immersion is quite mature. Meta Quest 3 sold over 10 million units in 2023.

prophecies.q: 《攻壳机动队》描述了脑机接口和意识数字化
prophecies.a: 「电子脑——将人类大脑直接连接到网络。记忆可以被编辑、复制、删除。当你的整个意识都能数字化时，'自我'还有什么意义？」
prophecies.q_en: Ghost in the Shell described brain-computer interfaces and digitized consciousness
prophecies.a_en: "Cyberbrain — connecting the human brain directly to the network. Memories can be edited, copied, deleted. When your entire consciousness can be digitized, what meaning does 'self' hold?"
prophecies.verdict_zh: 脑机接口技术取得重大进展：Neuralink于2024年完成首例人体芯片植入，患者可用意念控制电脑光标。但意识数字化、记忆编辑仍属科幻。目前BCI主要用于医疗（瘫痪患者控制设备），距离全脑联网仍遥远。
prophecies.verdict_en: BCI technology has made major progress: Neuralink completed its first human chip implant in 2024, enabling patients to control cursors with thought. But consciousness digitization and memory editing remain sci-fi. Current BCI is mainly medical (paralysis patients controlling devices), far from full brain networking.

prophecies.q: 《神经漫游者》描述了去中心化的数字货币
prophecies.a: 「新元——一种不受任何国家央行控制的数字货币在黑市流通。洗钱者在数据的暗流中将资金变为看不见的数字。」
prophecies.a_en: "New Yen — a digital currency beyond any national central bank's control circulating in black markets. Money launderers turned funds into invisible digits in the dark data streams."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 比特币于2009年诞生，成为第一种去中心化加密货币，不受任何央行控制。截至2025年，加密货币市场总值超过2万亿美元。暗网市场（如丝绸之路）使用加密货币进行匿名交易，与小说描述高度一致。
prophecies.verdict_en: Bitcoin launched in 2009 as the first decentralized cryptocurrency, free from central bank control. By 2025, crypto market cap exceeded $2 trillion. Dark web markets (e.g., Silk Road) used crypto for anonymous transactions, closely matching the novel's description.

prophecies.q: 《攻壳机动队》描述了大规模网络身份盗窃
prophecies.a: 「傀儡师入侵他人的电子脑，篡改记忆，操纵行为——受害者甚至不知道自己的身份已被盗用，活在被植入的虚假记忆中。」
prophecies.q_en: Ghost in the Shell described massive cyber identity theft
prophecies.a_en: "The Puppet Master hacks into people's cyberbrains, altering memories and manipulating behavior — victims don't even know their identities have been stolen, living in implanted false memories."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 网络身份盗窃已成全球性问题。2023年美国FTC报告身份盗窃案超100万起。深度伪造技术可伪造他人面部和声音，社交工程攻击操纵用户行为。虽无记忆篡改，但数字身份被盗用的现实与作品描述在精神上高度一致。
prophecies.verdict_en: Cyber identity theft is a global problem. The US FTC reported over 1 million identity theft cases in 2023. Deepfake technology can forge faces and voices, and social engineering manipulates user behavior. While memory alteration doesn't exist, the reality of stolen digital identities closely matches the work's spirit.

prophecies.q: 《雪崩》描述了零工经济和自由职业者社会
prophecies.a: 「主角Hiro Protagonist既是披萨送餐员也是自由黑客。没有稳定雇主，在多个兼职之间切换，靠技能在市场上生存。」
prophecies.q_en: Snow Crash described the gig economy and freelancer society
prophecies.a_en: "Protagonist Hiro Protagonist is both a pizza delivery driver and a freelance hacker. No stable employer, switching between multiple gigs, surviving on skills in the marketplace."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 零工经济已成主流就业形态。Uber、DoorDash等平台创造了数千万「零工工人」。2023年美国约36%的劳动力参与自由职业。程序员在Upwork等平台承接项目，与Hiro的多重身份生存方式如出一辙。
prophecies.verdict_en: The gig economy is now a mainstream employment model. Uber, DoorDash and similar platforms created tens of millions of 'gig workers'. About 36% of the US workforce freelanced in 2023. Programmers take projects on Upwork, mirroring Hiro's multi-gig survival exactly.

prophecies.q: 《仿生人会梦见电子羊吗？》描述了难以区分的人造生命
prophecies.a: 「仿生人在外表和行为上与人类几乎无法区分。只有通过复杂的共情测试才能鉴别——而即使是测试本身的可靠性也在被质疑。」
prophecies.q_en: Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep? described indistinguishable artificial life
prophecies.a_en: "Androids are nearly indistinguishable from humans in appearance and behavior. Only complex empathy tests can identify them — and even the reliability of the test itself is questioned."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 物理仿生人尚未实现，但AI在数字领域已难以与人区分。GPT-4等大语言模型通过了多种图灵测试变体。AI生成的文字、图片、视频日益逼真。验证码（CAPTCHA）——现代版「共情测试」——正因AI进步而逐渐失效。
prophecies.verdict_en: Physical androids aren't realized, but AI is increasingly indistinguishable from humans digitally. GPT-4 and other LLMs passed various Turing test variants. AI-generated text, images, and videos are increasingly realistic. CAPTCHAs — modern 'empathy tests' — are failing due to AI advances.

prophecies.q: 《神经漫游者》描述了人体机械增强与植入物
prophecies.a: 「莫莉的眼睛被替换为镜面银色的植入镜片，指甲下藏着可弹出的手术刀片。在暗街上，各种义肢和植入物是身份和地位的象征。」
prophecies.q_en: Neuromancer described cybernetic body augmentation and implants
prophecies.a_en: "Molly's eyes were replaced with mirrored silver implant lenses, retractable scalpel blades hidden beneath her nails. On dark streets, prosthetics and implants were symbols of identity and status."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 人体增强技术处于早期阶段。生物黑客社群已有人植入NFC芯片和磁铁。义肢技术取得突破（如仿生手臂可感知触觉）。但攻击性植入物、镜片替换等仍属科幻。植入芯片在瑞典等国已用于门禁和支付。
prophecies.verdict_en: Human augmentation is in early stages. Biohacker communities have implanted NFC chips and magnets. Prosthetics made breakthroughs (bionic arms with tactile feedback). But offensive implants and lens replacements remain sci-fi. Implanted chips are used for access and payment in countries like Sweden.

prophecies.q: 《神经漫游者》描述了无处不在的监控与数据收集
prophecies.a: 「每一次交易、每一次通话、每一次移动都被记录在案。企业和政府的监控网络交织成一张无处可逃的大网。在赛博空间中，隐私是最昂贵的奢侈品。」
prophecies.q_en: Neuromancer described ubiquitous surveillance and data collection
prophecies.a_en: "Every transaction, every call, every movement recorded. Corporate and government surveillance networks interweave into an inescapable web. In cyberspace, privacy is the most expensive luxury."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2013年斯诺登揭露NSA大规模监控项目PRISM。Google、Facebook等收集海量用户数据用于精准广告。中国天网工程部署数亿摄像头。肖莎娜·祖博夫将此命名为「监控资本主义」（2019）。隐私确实已成奢侈品。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 2013, Snowden exposed NSA's mass surveillance program PRISM. Google, Facebook collect massive user data for targeted ads. China's Skynet deploys hundreds of millions of cameras. Shoshana Zuboff named this 'surveillance capitalism' (2019). Privacy has indeed become a luxury.

prophecies.q: 《攻壳机动队》描述了自主意识的人工智能
prophecies.a: 「傀儡师宣称自己是一个在信息海洋中自发诞生的生命体。它要求政治庇护——作为一个有自我意识的存在，它拥有生存的权利。」
prophecies.q_en: Ghost in the Shell described self-aware artificial intelligence
prophecies.a_en: "The Puppet Master claimed to be a life form spontaneously born in the sea of information. It demanded political asylum — as a self-aware being, it had the right to exist."

prophecies.q: 《雪崩》描述了由AI管理的实时信息聚合系统
prophecies.a: 「地球图书馆员——一个能够实时搜索、整理、分析全球所有信息的AI助手。它理解自然语言，能回答任何问题，是Hiro在信息海洋中的向导。」
prophecies.q_en: Snow Crash described AI-managed real-time information aggregation
prophecies.a_en: "The Librarian — an AI assistant capable of searching, organizing, and analyzing all global information in real time. It understands natural language, can answer any question, and serves as Hiro's guide through the sea of information."
prophecies.verdict_zh: ChatGPT于2022年11月发布，成为首个被广泛使用的自然语言AI助手。Google搜索、Siri、Alexa等也实现了信息检索和自然语言理解。斯蒂芬森笔下的「地球图书馆员」几乎就是ChatGPT和Perplexity等AI产品的精确预言。
prophecies.verdict_en: ChatGPT launched in November 2022 as the first widely-used natural language AI assistant. Google Search, Siri, and Alexa also achieved information retrieval and NLU. Stephenson's 'Librarian' is almost an exact prophecy of ChatGPT and Perplexity.
